# Animation State Machine

> State machine-based animation control

**Category:** Ui · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ui · godot

## What this does

State machine-based animation control

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **State Creation** — when Define animation states is requested, then Define animation states completed.
- **Transitions** — when Move between states with conditions is requested, then Move between states with conditions completed.
- **Blend Spaces** — when 1D/2D parametric blending is requested, then 1D/2D parametric blending completed.
- **State Callbacks** — when Execute code on state change is requested, then Execute code on state change completed.
